TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Maysang Kalimud Maysang Kalimud, i saka10 no saka7 no falod to 1933 a mihecaan ko kahofocaan nira, tahira i saka27 no saka1 niyaro'no folad to 2007 a mihecaan ko 'orip nira. O Falangaway a tamdaw ko mira. 1960 a mihecaan mikihatiya to Olinpik . Pakatama to impay no tikaselon, malasa'ayaway pakaalaay to ngangan i Aw^in no Cong-howa-min-kok; o roma sa to, awaay ho ko roma a tamdaw a mikikaka to pakaalaay nira a tingso-9000, "C.K.Yang" ko cimil a ngangan nira. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: majsaŇč ka…ĺimo~u~u…¨~…ģ majsaŇč ka…ĺimo~u~u…¨~…ģ, i saka** no~u saka* no~u fa…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u kańßo~ufo~u ¶aan nira, tańßira i saka** no~u saka* nijaro~u °no~u fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u °o~urip nira. o~u fa…ĺaŇčawaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u mira. **** a mińß…ô ¶aan mikińßatija to~u o~u…ĺinpik . pakatama to~u impaj no~u tikas…ô…ĺo~un, ma…ĺasa °ajawaj pakaa…ĺaaj to~u ŇčaŇčan i aw Ēin no~u ¶o~uŇč-ńßo~uwa-min-ko~uk; o~u ro~uma sa to~u, awaaj ńßo~u ko~u ro~uma a tam…¨~…ģaw a mikikaka to~u pakaa…ĺaaj nira a tiŇčso~u-****, " ¶.k.jaŇč" ko~u ¶imi…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan nira. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw
S.FORM: Maysang Kalimud Maysang Kalimud, i saka10 no saka7 no falod to 1933 a mihecaan ko kahofocaan nira, tahira i saka27 no saka1 niyaro'no folad to 2007 a mihecaan ko 'orip nira. O Falangaway a tamdaw ko mira. 1960 a mihecaan mikihatiya to Olinpik . Pakatama to impay no tikaselon, malasa'ayaway pakaalaay to ngangan i Aw^in no Cong-howa-min-kok; o roma sa to, awaay ho ko roma a tamdaw a mikikaka to pakaalaay nira a tingso-9000, "C.K.Yang" ko cimil a ngangan nira. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: majsaŇč ka…ĺimo~u~u…¨~…ģ majsaŇč ka…ĺimo~u~u…¨~…ģ, i saka** no~u saka* no~u fa…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u kańßo~ufo~u ¶aan nira, tańßira i saka** no~u saka* nijaro~u °no~u fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u °o~urip nira. o~u fa…ĺaŇčawaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u mira. **** a mińß…ô ¶aan mikińßatija to~u o~u…ĺinpik . pakatama to~u impaj no~u tikas…ô…ĺo~un, ma…ĺasa °ajawaj pakaa…ĺaaj to~u ŇčaŇčan i aw Ēin no~u ¶o~uŇč-ńßo~uwa-min-ko~uk; o~u ro~uma sa to~u, awaaj ńßo~u ko~u ro~uma a tam…¨~…ģaw a mikikaka to~u pakaa…ĺaaj nira a tiŇčso~u-****, " ¶.k.jaŇč" ko~u ¶imi…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan nira. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw
